general_notes: In-house underwriting. No tax documents required.
3 income doc options: WVOE (wage earner), CPA-prepared P&L, or borrower-prepared P&L.
Private landlord VOR accepted — no proof of rent payment required.
Available in CA, TX, NV. CA has 8 eligible counties with higher limits ($5M, 75% LTV) as of 02-03-2026.

additional_rules.foreign_national: No EAD card holder. Eligible VISA types: B1, B2, H2, H3, I, J, K, ESTA.
additional_rules.cash_out_seasoning: Current mortgage must be seasoned 12 months; 6 months title seasoning
